get.description: Fetch all audit logs with optional filters: action, module, date range, and search, with pagination

parameters.description: Number of items per page (default 10, max 100)
parameters.name: pageSize

post.description: Export audit logs filtered by action, module, date range, or search term to PDF or Excel

get.description: Fetch a single audit log by its ID

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT token along with user details
Log out the user and return user details with cleared session info
Generate a new access token and refresh token using a valid refresh token

get.description: Fetch all modules with their enabled permissions
Get all roles with optional search filtering

post.description: Create a new role with the provided information

get.description: Get a single role by their ID

delete.description: Delete a role by ID. If the role has users (UserCount > 0), a new_role_id must be provided in the JSON body to reassign them.

parameters.description: Reassignment Details (Required if assigned users exist)
parameters.name: request

get.description: Fetch all settings filtered by group or key

post.description: Create a setting with group_order, group, key, value, description, type, possible_values, and icon

put.description: Update setting fields by group and key

get.description: Get all users filtered by status, role, and search term

post.description: Create a new user with assigned role
Export users list to PDF or Excel format with optional filters

get.description: Get a single user by ID

put.description: Update user password using old and new password

Bearer.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
Bearer.name: Authorization
